contextBanner: [TBG | Sprint 037A | Local Agent Harness Foundation | branch: sprint/037a-local-agent-harness]
doctrine: Runtime proof remains separate from code-intelligence proof.
No game launch unless the active contract explicitly allows it.
If a command assumes Bannerlord should not be running, run ForgeStop first.
Do not commit real local secrets, tokens, saves, or machine-specific config.
AGENTS.md is the common denominator; targeted skills live under .tbg/skills.
Harness maturity means cross-cutting plumbing moves into contracts, policies, registries, guards, evidence, and reporting; domain behavior remains visible in skills or source modules.
Stale PRs are classified and selectively replayed, not blindly deleted, squashed, or used as bases.
